response.overview: Two burglars, each with their own motives and methods, accidentally target the same secluded house on a stormy night. Unbeknownst to them, the house is far from ordinary—it's a carefully orchestrated trap designed to lure them both. As they cross paths in the dark, their uneasy alliance quickly devolves into mistrust and chaos.
response.tagline: As they cross paths in the dark, their uneasy alliance quickly devolves into mistrust and chaos.
response.title: Double Crossed
